name: TensorOrbit-JARVIS-v2 external tensor-oracle qualification v1
purpose: Prepare matched v2 split training for independent external tensor oracles only; this is not a GaugeFlow generation protocol.

data.tensor_target: Reynolds-projected Cartesian rank-three piezoelectric tensor, symmetric in final two indices
data.tensor_coordinate_convention: GaugeFlow 18-dimensional CartesianTensor('ijk=ikj') irrep coordinates or equivalent 3x3x3 Cartesian tensor

oracles.output_contract: one predicted Cartesian 3x3x3 tensor and one explicit abstention/validity field for every v2 val/test material_id

oracles.architecture_class: e3nn SE(3)-Transformer with a rank-three Cartesian tensor head
oracles.output_contract: one predicted Cartesian 3x3x3 tensor and one explicit abstention/validity field for every v2 val/test material_id

validation_metrics: complete response-field error on fixed lossless probes
qualification_plan.ensemble_rule: No predictor is a Gate A oracle until GMTNet and the architecture-distinct predictor both complete matched v2 validation under frozen manifests. PiezoJet may be evaluated later only as a non-primary additional member.
activation_requires: this protocol committed with its manifest hash
both external training manifests committed or externally pinned
